allow: PowerShell(php artisan wayfinder:generate --with-form 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; "--- format script available? ---"; \(Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).scripts.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'format|lint|types' } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Value\)" })

PowerShell($env:DB_HOST='localhost'; $env:DB_USERNAME='postgres'; $env:DB_PASSWORD=$env:FSA_TEST_DB_PASSWORD; $env:DB_DATABASE='futureshift_test'; php -d memory_limit=2048M vendor/phpunit/phpunit/phpunit --no-coverage > full-test.txt 2>&1; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE" | Out-File -Append full-test.txt -Encoding utf8)

PowerShell($env:DB_HOST='localhost'; $env:DB_USERNAME='postgres'; $env:DB_PASSWORD=$env:FSA_TEST_DB_PASSWORD; $env:DB_DATABASE='futureshift_test'; php -d memory_limit=1024M vendor/phpunit/phpunit/phpunit --no-coverage tests/Feature/Npo/GovernanceReviewAnalyzerTest.php 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; "=== pint ==="; php vendor/bin/pint --test app/Http/Controllers/Advisor/ClientController.php tests/Feature/Npo/GovernanceReviewAnalyzerTest.php 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2)

PowerShell($raw = Get-Content full-test.txt -Raw -Encoding Unicode; if \($raw.IndexOf\('{"tool"'\) -lt 0\) { $raw = Get-Content full-test.txt -Raw }; $s = $raw.IndexOf\('{"tool"'\); $e = $raw.LastIndexOf\('}'\); $j = $raw.Substring\($s, $e-$s+1\) | ConvertFrom-Json; "result=$\($j.result\) tests=$\($j.tests\) passed=$\($j.passed\) failed=$\($j.failed\) errors=$\($j.errors\) assertions=$\($j.assertions\)")
Bash(grep -nE "Incorporated Societies, PPSR|Whisper today|reads on approval|reads \\\(no table\\\)|integrations.\\.\\{key\\}|config\\\('integrations\\.…'\\\)" PLAN-ADMIN-DATA-AND-CREDENTIALS.md)
Bash(grep -nE "No code path reads a raw key except the resolver\\.$|reads a raw key except the resolver\\.\\"|services\\.whisper\\.live.*Live" PLAN-ADMIN-DATA-AND-CREDENTIALS.md)
